properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2 C2 V5 C6

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Some bright morning when this life is over I'll fly away To that home on God's celestial shore I'll fly away

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I'll fly away, oh glory I'll fly away in the morning When I die hallelujah by and by I'll fly away

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: When the shadows of this life have gone I'll fly away Like a bird from these prison walls I'll fly I'll fly away

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Oh how glad and happy when we meet I'll fly away No more cold iron shackles on my feet I'll fly away

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Just a few more weary days and then I'll fly away To a land where joys will never end I'll fly away

verse.name: C6
verse.lines: I'll fly away, oh glory I'll fly away in the morning When I die hallelujah by and by I'll fly away, I'll fly away
